description: Style Note The German brand puma is known world over for their infusion of colour and minimalist styling into classic wardrobe staples. With its fine finishing and detailing this printed T-shirt easily makes it to our wishlist for the Summer. Pair it with distressed denims and flip-flops for a rugged look or with track pants and sneakers for a workout. Product Details Yellow T-shirt with graphic print on front, short sleeves with branding on left sleeve, green chain stitch at shoulder and back neck, branding at back neck Materials and Care 100% cotton Wash and iron inside out Machine wash warm Warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model(height 6'and shoulders 18") is wearing a size L
